claim_results.claim: Any system capable of producing physical reality requires exactly three irreducible operations: possibility, measurement, and actualization.
Any claim that turns a structural resemblance into a proven mechanism belongs here until the math, experiment, or textual chain can carry the weight.
Possible overstatement: language that sounds final should be read as a working model unless the article explicitly proves it.

This article shows that any system capable of producing reality — not metaphorical reality, but actual physical existence — requires exactly three irreducible operations: possibility (the source of potential states), measurement (the selection of one state from many), and actualization (the instantiation of the selected state into physical existence).
Rigor & Kill Conditions Every claim is held to explicit falsification standards.

Kill if: the structural three-fold pattern shared by quantum mechanics, information theory, and classical logic can be shown to be coincidental rather than constitutive — i.e., the same three operations are not in fact what each system requires.
Plain English: The most empirically confirmed equation in physics.
Plain English: Any system that produces actual physical existence requires exactly three operations.
The framework reads this convergence as evidence that the three-fold structure is constitutive of reality, not coincidental.

Plain English: The Trinity mapping is not imposed onto physics â€” it falls out of the constraint that any reality-producing system requires exactly three irreducible operations. (Defined in detail in Article 11.)
The probability law for quantum measurement; the location where the three-fold structure shows up most cleanly in physics.

Framework's central coherence equation. (Defined in Article 08.)
Same Master-Equation variable, two coordinate names: "entropy" in the physics frame, "sin" in the theological frame.

Logos Field ($\chi$) The pervasive substrate of coherent reality — the framework's $\chi$ field; the Master-Equation field whose value is total system coherence. (Earlier drafts denoted this with $\Lambda$; that symbol is now reserved for the cosmological constant.) Field ≠ coupling : this entry locks the substrate sense.
